title: Commodities Rally Amid Speculation China Will Ease Covid 19 Policy
section_path: Commodities Rally Amid Speculation China Will Ease Covid 19 Policy
section_path_text: Commodities Rally Amid Speculation China Will Ease Covid 19 Policy
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodities rallied on reports that China will ease COVID-19 restrictions. Speculation of a less hawkish Federal Reserve also boosted sentiment. Copper led the base metals sector higher on speculation that Beijing is preparing to ease China's stringent COVID-19 rules.
